func solve(landStartTime []int64, landDuration []int64, waterStartTime []int64, waterDuration []int64) int64 {
    var minTime int64 = 1<<63 - 1

    lenLand := len(landStartTime)
    lenWater := len(waterStartTime)

    for i := 0; i < lenLand; i++ {
        for j := 0; j < lenWater; j++ {
            // Land first then water
            landEnd := landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i]
            waterStart := landEnd
            if waterStart < waterStartTime[j] {
                waterStart = waterStartTime[j]
            }
            waterEnd := waterStart + waterDuration[j]
            if waterEnd < minTime {
                minTime = waterEnd
            }

            // Water first then land
            waterEnd2 := waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j]
            landStart := waterEnd2
            if landStart < landStartTime[i] {
                landStart = landStartTime[i]
            }
            landEnd2 := landStart + landDuration[i]
            if landEnd2 < minTime {
                minTime = landEnd2
            }
        }
    }

    return minTime
}
